question: What extra review applies to billing features before launch?
expected_answer_notes: Answer should mention finance review and a staged release plan.

retrieved_docs.title: Product Launch Checklist
retrieved_docs.text: Before launch, every feature must complete QA sign-off, documentation review, analytics event verification, and rollback plan approval. Features touching billing also require finance review and a staged release plan.

retrieved_docs.title: Remote Work Policy
retrieved_docs.text: Employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval. Core collaboration hours are 10:00 to 15:00 local time. Security training must be completed before accessing internal systems from personal networks.

retrieved_docs.title: Vendor Review Requirements
retrieved_docs.text: New vendors handling customer data must complete a security questionnaire, sign a data processing agreement, and provide evidence of encryption at rest and in transit. Annual renewals require reassessment if risk exposure changes.

final_prompt:
You are a concise QA assistant for eval exercises. Answer only from the retrieved context. If the context does not support the answer, say that clearly.
Retrieved context:
- [doc-007] Product Launch Checklist (product): Before launch, every feature must complete QA sign-off, documentation review, analytics event verification, and rollback plan approval. Features touching billing also require finance review and a staged release plan.
- [doc-001] Remote Work Policy (hr): Employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval. Core collaboration hours are 10:00 to 15:00 local time. Security training must be completed before accessing internal systems from personal networks.
- [doc-012] Vendor Review Requirements (procurement): New vendors handling customer data must complete a security questionnaire, sign a data processing agreement, and provide evidence of encryption at rest and in transit. Annual renewals require reassessment if risk exposure changes.
Question: What extra review applies to billing features before launch?
Answer:
answer: Billing-related features require **finance review** and a **staged release plan** before launch.
